definitions.text: To crush something, especially food, with a noisy crackling sound.
examples: When I came home, Susan was watching TV with her feet up on the couch, crunching a piece of celery.

definitions.text: To be crushed with a noisy crackling sound.
examples: Beetles crunched beneath the men's heavy boots as they worked.

definitions.text: This term needs a definition. Please help out and add a definition, then remove the text {{rfdef}}.
A noisy crackling sound; the sound usually associated with crunching.
A problem that leads to a crisis.
